metadata.name: settle_agent_card
metadata.description: Settle — control layer for AI-agent payments on Solana

instructions.name: claim_streaming
docs: Streaming claim — agent draws accrued entitlement up to max_total - claimed,
minus any time spent paused. Updates parent card.used_today (cross-pact daily
cap stays enforced).

accounts.name: agent
docs: Agent signer — must equal card.agent_pubkey. The user does NOT sign per-claim.

accounts.name: fee_payer
docs: Fee payer (typically the agent itself).

instructions.name: close_pact
docs: Close a Pact. Refunds unspent vault balance to authority's USDC ATA on-chain
(no off-band merchant signing required). Mode-agnostic: works for both OneShot
and Streaming pacts because the refund reads from vault_usdc.amount directly.

instructions.name: create_card
docs: Initialize an AgentCard PDA. Authority signs; agent_pubkey is recorded but does NOT
sign the create_card ix itself. The agent_pubkey will sign spend_via_pact later.

accounts.name: usdc_mint
docs: USDC mint pinned at creation; spend rejects any other mint.

instructions.name: dispute_delivery_escrow
docs: Buyer-only dispute within the dispute window. Refunds vault → buyer's USDC ATA
and closes the pact. Distinct from close_pact: timing constraint + dedicated
event for the unified ledger.

accounts.name: authority_usdc
docs: Buyer's USDC ATA, where the refund lands.

instructions.name: open_delivery_escrow
docs: Open a DeliveryEscrow Pact + atomically fund vault. Buyer signs. Merchant +
capability_hash pinned at open. confirm_deadline_slot ≤ dispute_deadline_slot
enforced. State machine: open → released | refunded.

instructions.name: open_pact
docs: Open a Pact + atomically fund its Vault PDA's USDC ATA with cap_lamports.
After this ix, the agent can spend autonomously up to the cap.

accounts.name: usdc_mint
docs: USDC mint, must equal parent_card.usdc_mint.

accounts.name: authority_usdc
docs: Authority's USDC ATA (source of funding).

accounts.name: vault_usdc
docs: Vault's USDC ATA (init if needed; authority pays rent).

instructions.name: open_streaming_pact
docs: Open a Streaming Pact + atomically fund vault with max_total_lamports.
Entitlement accrues at rate_lamports_per_slot from the open slot forward.

accounts.name: usdc_mint
docs: USDC mint, must equal parent_card.usdc_mint.

instructions.name: pause_streaming
docs: Authority-only pause. While paused, no entitlement accrues. Idempotent.

instructions.name: record_denial
docs: Record a denial that was decided off-chain. Authority-signed; produces a
PolicyDecisionEvent so the on-chain ledger reflects every DENY with merchant +
pact context for indexer filtering.

accounts.name: signer
docs: Either the card's authority OR its agent_pubkey may sign a denial.
- Authority can record DENYs in direct (legacy) mode.
- Agent can record DENYs in pact mode (where the agent is the only signer
the proxy holds; without this, pact-mode DENYs would never land on-chain
and the unified ledger would be incomplete).

instructions.name: record_receipt
docs: Standalone kernel attestation. Emits `ReceiptRecordedEvent` with the
4-hash commit chain + kind discriminator + context_hash binding.
Permissionless — any signer attests; verifier decides whether to
trust based on the attestor pubkey. See instructions/record_receipt.rs
for the full design rationale.

accounts.name: attestor
docs: Anyone can attest. The signer's pubkey is recorded as `attestor` in
the emitted event so a verifier can decide whether to trust the
attestation (e.g. "only attestations from Settle's operator key
surface in the merchant dashboard").

instructions.name: release_delivery_escrow
docs: Release escrowed funds to the pinned merchant. Two callers: buyer (any time)
or anyone permissionlessly after confirm_deadline_slot. Merchant pinned at
open prevents redirection. Closes the pact on success.

accounts.name: caller
docs: Caller — may be the buyer (card.authority) or any third party. Pays the tx fee.

accounts.name: merchant_usdc
docs: Merchant's USDC ATA. Validated below: token::authority must equal the merchant
pubkey pinned at open time inside PactMode::DeliveryEscrow.merchant. Without this
check, a stranger could call release-after-deadline with their own ATA and steal
the funds.

instructions.name: resume_streaming
docs: Authority-only resume. Closes out the in-flight pause window into
pause_accumulated_slots so the next claim doesn't bill paused time. Idempotent.

instructions.name: revoke
docs: Mark card as revoked. Idempotent. Bumps policy_version. Emits both
PolicyDecisionEvent (decision=2 REVOKE) and CardRevokedEvent.

instructions.name: spend
docs: Authority-signed spend (legacy / direct mode).
For the autonomous-agent flow, prefer `spend_via_pact`.

accounts.name: usdc_mint
docs: USDC mint, pinned to card.usdc_mint.

accounts.name: authority_usdc
docs: Authority's USDC token account (source) — must hold the pinned mint.

accounts.name: merchant_usdc
docs: Merchant's USDC token account (destination) — must be owned by `merchant_owner`
and hold the pinned mint.

instructions.name: spend_via_pact
docs: Pact-scoped autonomous spend — agent signs, Vault PDA executes the transfer.
The user does NOT sign this ix per-spend.

accounts.name: agent
docs: Agent signer — must equal card.agent_pubkey.
This is the only Signer in the ix; the user does NOT sign per-spend.

accounts.name: fee_payer
docs: Fee payer (typically the same as agent, but doesn't have to be).

accounts.name: card
docs: Parent AgentCard — MUTABLE because we update used_today + last_reset_slot.
This is what enforces the daily cap across multiple Pacts on the same card.

accounts.name: vault
docs: Vault PDA — owns the USDC ATA. Signed by program via with_signer.

accounts.name: usdc_mint
docs: USDC mint, pinned to pact.usdc_mint.

accounts.name: vault_usdc
docs: Vault's USDC ATA (source).

accounts.name: merchant_usdc
docs: Merchant's USDC token account (destination) — must be owned by `merchant_owner`.

errors.name: CardRevoked
errors.msg: Card is revoked.

errors.name: CardExpired
errors.msg: Card is expired.

errors.name: OverCap
errors.msg: Spend exceeds daily cap or per-call max.

errors.name: OffAllowlist
errors.msg: Merchant is not on the allowlist.

errors.name: CapabilityNotPinned
errors.msg: Capability hash does not match the pinned hash for this merchant.

errors.name: MerchantNotVerified
errors.msg: Merchant is not present in the verified registry.

errors.name: AllowlistTooLong
errors.msg: Allowlist exceeds maximum entries (10).

errors.name: PactAllowlistTooLong
errors.msg: Pact merchant allowlist exceeds maximum entries (5).

errors.name: PactClosed
errors.msg: Pact is closed.

errors.name: PactOverCap
errors.msg: Pact spent would exceed cap.

errors.name: UnauthorizedAuthority
errors.msg: Unauthorized authority for this card.

errors.name: UnauthorizedAgent
errors.msg: Unauthorized agent (signer pubkey does not match card.agent_pubkey).

errors.name: PactCardMismatch
errors.msg: Pact's parent_card does not match the supplied card.

errors.name: WrongMint
errors.msg: USDC mint does not match the mint pinned at card creation.

errors.name: InvalidDenyCode
errors.msg: Invalid deny code.

errors.name: InvalidHashLength
errors.msg: Receipt hash must be 32 bytes (BLAKE3).

errors.name: ZeroAmount
errors.msg: Amount must be greater than zero.

errors.name: DestinationOwnerMismatch
errors.msg: Pact merchant_owner does not own the supplied destination token account.

errors.name: NotOneShotMode
errors.msg: Operation requires a OneShot pact; this pact is in Streaming mode.

errors.name: NotStreamingMode
errors.msg: Operation requires a Streaming pact; this pact is in OneShot mode.

errors.name: NothingToClaim
errors.msg: No billable slots have accrued since the last claim.

errors.name: StreamMaxReached
errors.msg: Streaming pact has reached its max_total_lamports.

errors.name: NotDeliveryEscrowMode
errors.msg: Operation requires a DeliveryEscrow pact; this pact is in a different mode.

errors.name: EscrowAlreadyReleased
errors.msg: Delivery escrow has already been released to the merchant.

errors.name: EscrowAlreadyRefunded
errors.msg: Delivery escrow has already been refunded to the buyer.

errors.name: EscrowConfirmDeadlineNotPassed
errors.msg: Permissionless release requires the confirm deadline to have passed.

errors.name: EscrowDisputeWindowClosed
errors.msg: Dispute window has closed; the escrow can no longer be refunded by the buyer.

errors.name: InvalidEscrowDeadlines
errors.msg: confirm_deadline_slot must be ≤ dispute_deadline_slot, and both must be in the future.

types.name: AgentCard
docs: AgentCard PDA. Seeds: [b"agent-card", authority.key(), label_hash]

types.name: AllowlistEntry
docs: Bounded allowlist entry. Capability_hash optional → if Some, spend MUST pin to that hash.
Used by both AgentCard.allowlist and Pact.allowlist (so a Pact can pin capabilities
per-merchant just like the parent card).

types.name: DeliveryEscrowDisputedEvent
docs: P9 — Disputed: refunded to buyer within the dispute window.

types.name: DeliveryEscrowOpenedEvent
docs: P9 — DeliveryEscrow opened: vault funded, merchant + capability + deadlines pinned.

types.name: DeliveryEscrowReleasedEvent
docs: P9 — Released to merchant. `is_buyer_confirmed = true` when caller == buyer
(early confirm); `false` when called permissionlessly post-deadline.

types.name: Pact
docs: Pact PDA: task-scoped child card. Seeds: [b"pact", parent_card.key(), scope_label_hash]
Each Pact has a Vault PDA at [b"pact-vault", pact.key()] which is the authority of
the Pact's USDC ATA. The vault PDA is owned by this program and signs CPIs via
program-derived signing (ctx.bumps.vault_bump). This is what makes truly autonomous
agent spend possible: the user funds the vault once at open_pact time, then the agent
can trigger spend_via_pact / claim_streaming without per-spend authority signatures.
The `mode` field is a `PactMode` enum: `OneShot` for the original capped-spend variant,
`Streaming` for the rate-limited variant introduced in v0.3 (P1).

types.name: PactMode
docs: Pact spend mode. OneShot is the existing capped-budget pact; Streaming is the per-slot
rate-limited variant introduced in v0.3 (P1).
Slot accounting for Streaming:
- `last_claim_slot` is the anchor; entitlement accrues from this slot forward at
`rate_lamports_per_slot` per slot.
- When `paused == true`, no entitlement accrues. We record `pause_started_slot` and
count paused slots into `pause_accumulated_slots` *during the current claim period*.
Both reset on a successful claim.
- At claim time:
* if currently paused, finalize the running pause: pause_accumulated +=
(current - pause_started); pause_started <- current (so a continuing pause is
not retroactively charged after this claim).
* billable_slots = (current - last_claim) - pause_accumulated
* entitlement = billable_slots * rate, capped at (max_total - claimed).

types.name: PactStreamClaimEvent
docs: Emitted on every successful claim_streaming.

types.name: PactStreamPauseEvent
docs: Emitted on pause + resume of a Streaming Pact. `paused = true` for pause,
`paused = false` for resume.

types.name: PolicyDecisionEvent
docs: Unified ALLOW/DENY/REVOKE on-chain ledger event (N18).
Indexer (Helius LaserStream / WebSocket) consumes these to populate Postgres
dual-receipt views. Decision = 0 ALLOW / 1 DENY / 2 REVOKE.

types.name: ReceiptRecordedEvent
docs: F2.0 Universal Receipt Kernel — Path A on-chain attestation.
Emitted by `record_receipt` to record a 4-hash kernel commit on-chain
for any payment kind (including non-Anchor-routed direct sends, link
claims, refunds). Indexer parses these and writes to Postgres alongside
PolicyDecisionEvent rows so dashboards can filter receipts by kind.
Layout (Borsh, little-endian):
attestor(32) kind(u8) receipt_hash(32) reason_hash(32)
policy_snapshot_hash(32) purpose_hash(32) context_hash(32) slot(u64)

fields.name: attestor
docs: The signer that attested. Verifier decides whether to trust based on
who this is (e.g. only Settle operator's key for merchant dashboards).

fields.name: kind
docs: Kind tag — matches @settle/sdk `KIND_TAG`:
1=x402_spend, 2=direct_send, 3=link_send, 4=streaming_claim,
5=escrow_release, 6=escrow_dispute, 7=refund.

types.name: StreamingPactOpenedEvent
docs: Streaming Pact opened. Mirrors PactOpenedEvent but carries rate + max_total
instead of a single cap field, so the indexer can populate streaming-specific UI.
